sentiment.reasoning: An open letter from the CTO is a reactive measure to calm investor sentiment, which typically provides a minor short-term stabilization effect without changing long-term fundamentals.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
